data.name: severity.info
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity badge label rendered by Blazor adapter notification components. Short noun; sentence case; pairs with the info icon.

data.name: severity.warning
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity badge label rendered by Blazor adapter notification components. Short noun; sentence case; pairs with the warning icon.

data.name: severity.error
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity badge label rendered by Blazor adapter notification components. Short noun; sentence case; pairs with the error icon.

data.name: severity.critical
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity badge label rendered by Blazor adapter notification components for system-impacting incidents. Pairs with high-attention visual styling.

data.name: action.save
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Submit-button label on Blazor adapter form components. Imperative; sentence case; pairs with action.cancel in dialogs.

data.name: action.cancel
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Dismiss-button label on Blazor adapter dialog components. Imperative; sentence case; pairs with action.save.

data.name: action.retry
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Retry-button label on Blazor adapter error/empty-state components. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: state.loading
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Skeleton / spinner placeholder rendered by Blazor adapter while async children resolve. Trailing U+2026 ellipsis preserved across translations.
